name: Herbed Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon chopped fresh basil or 1/4 teaspoon dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 1 inch of water to a boil in a 3-quart saucepan. Add broccoli and return to boiling.
2. Cover and reduce heat to simmer for about 10 minutes or until the broccoli is crisp-tender.
3. Drain the broccoli and set aside.
4. Spray a 10-inch skillet with nonstick cooking spray and heat over medium heat.
5. Heat the remaining ingredients (basil, oregano, salt, garlic, and chopped tomatoes) in the skillet for about 1 minute, stirring frequently until hot.
6. Pour the sauce over the broccoli and toss to combine.
Makes 4 servings.
